Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon May 26 16:15:40 2014
New Revision: 355408
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355408
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355408/

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.14
  - Use USES=libtool
  
  Changes:	http://www.netxms.org/download/ChangeLog
  PR:		ports/190216
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/netxms/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/netxms/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/netxms/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-mgmt/netxms/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/netxms/Makefile	Mon May 26 16:15:33 2014	(r355407)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netxms/Makefile	Mon May 26 16:15:40 2014	(r355408)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	netxms
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.13
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.14
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.netxms.org/download/ \
 		http://www.netxms.org/download/archive/
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ AGENT_DESC=	Install NetXMS agent
 NO_PACKAGE=	yes
 
 USE_OPENSSL=	yes
-USES=		iconv gmake perl5
+USES=		gmake iconv libtool perl5
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--disable-silent-rules
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
